main_topic: A repeatable 3-step workflow (brief → voice check → sprint) to publish a weekly newsletter faster.
audience: Solopreneurs building AI-assisted businesses (tools, agents, and systems).
goal: Give readers a practical system they can adopt this week to ship the next issue on time.
cta_style: One clear CTA, specific action, no link shorteners, no 'click here'.
cta_copy_hint: Reply 'weekly' to get my 1-page Weekly Writing System template.
notes: Integrate at least one stat/example from research.md (e.g., survey percentages, case study, or A/B test result).
Avoid banned phrases listed in writing-state.md.
